brief_justification: Paper A studies a non-equilibrium phase transition of the quantum contact process and how Trotterization/discretization plus destructive interference tunes its universality class (a critical-phenomena/directed-percolation branching mechanism). Paper B builds a simplicial complex from an observer's projection-valued local measurements in a von Neumann algebra to extract the topology of fluctuating spacetime (an operator-algebra/algebraic-topology construction). No role-for-role correspondence holds: one is a critical dynamical process with a percolation-type threshold, the other is an algebraic-topological reconstruction, so the machinery differs.
